_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 11 — TTS-bridge narration intros before each item. Two audio items, each with an intro_hint that DJ Layla speaks before the song plays. Load with ?fixture=13-narration-intro&debug to see the narration overlay (text in upper-third) + per-word highlight as the browser TTS speaks. The pipeline routes through the silent fallback in headless / no-SpeechSynthesis envs and through the real Web Speech API in the browser. Music bed isn't started in this fixture (chrome-none cinematic) so ducking isn't visible — see fixture 12 for the music-bed demo. Add &narrate=auto to enable the 'Up next: <title>' default for items WITHOUT intro_hint.
name: Demo — Narration Intro
description: Two audio items with DJ-host intros before each.

items.intro_hint: Welcome. This first one is a song about love and loss — about holding on when everything else slips away.
Up next — a quieter piece. Sometimes the absence of a thing tells you more than its presence ever could.
